official_functions.role: Provide the official Protocol 775 Configuration clientbound keep_alive input id, framed payload, packet table id, and body bytes.
Provide the official Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound keep_alive response frame for the mapped input id.

invariants: The inbound network frame is derived from the existing official Configuration clientbound keep_alive framed answer artifact.
The response network frame expectation is derived from the existing official Configuration serverbound keep_alive framed answer artifact.
The inbound and outbound official answer artifacts must use the same keep_alive id.
The runtime path under test is the factored keep_alive branch used by stevenarella/src/server/mod.rs Server::spawn_reader, not only Conn::read_packet(), Packet::map(), or packet::send_keep_alive.
The observed response bytes must be VarInt(length of official serverbound framed payload) followed by the official serverbound framed payload.
This contract is limited to one reader-loop keep_alive branch reaction and does not claim Configuration completion or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: This runtime metadata is stored below oracle/*/775/runtime and is not currently discovered by the jar-backed direct-file runner.
stop_boundary: Do not use this spawn_reader branch reaction probe to infer full login/configuration runtime behavior, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, world load, render readiness, or client-load completion.
